font-family.value: "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Ubuntu, "Segoe UI", Verdana, sans-serif

background-image.value: radial-gradient(circle at 0 100%, #2d62ff4d, #0000 50%), radial-gradient(circle at 100% 60%, #2d62ff4d, #1110 20%), radial-gradient(circle at 100% 100%, #d600c433, #0000 45%)

grid-template-columns.value: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr)
minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr)
minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr)
minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr)

--font-family--body.value: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, "Fira Sans", "Droid Sans", "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif

--font-family--heading.value: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, "Fira Sans", "Droid Sans", "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif
